Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 12 

ORG_NAME 

LABEL: Name of the TIN 

DESCRIPTION: Legal Business Name Associated with the ACO Participant TIN. 

SHORT NAME: ORG_NAME 

LONG NAME: ORG_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 70 

SOURCE: CMS Participating Provider Pioneer ACO RIF 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Null values indicates that the ACO did not submit a TIN name. The TIN number is in the field called 
ORG_TIN.
